title: Gunn & Moore GM Young Gunn Mini Cricket Set | Diamond B55S | Miniature 15" Bat, Stumps, Bails and Soft Ball | One Size
features: Miniature wooden cricket bat 15" (38cm) total length suitable only for very young children
Soft ball – The red ball is similar to a tennis ball in weight and construction; perfect for the beginner player to maximise their enjoyment of the game
Stumps and Bails – The set of 8" (20cm) mini stumps are on a wooden base with one set of bails which are fixed to the stumps
Part of the GM ‘BS55’ Endorsed by England Superstar Ben Stokes cricket range
The GM ‘Young Gunn’ cricket range has been specially designed to give future international cricketers a flying start to their careers; approved and endorsed by Team GM
